title: How Often Should Your Business Be Publishing Video? The Answer Might Surprise You
excerpt: The content marketing industry has a volume bias. Here's the part of the conversation that usually doesn't happen: the right publishing frequency is zero if what you're publishing isn't building toward something.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Video content strategy and production planning

content.caption: The first publishing priority for any business without cornerstone content is to make it

seo.title: How Often Should Your Business Publish Video? | Video Frequency Guide | First Sight Films
seo.description: How often should your Florida business publish video content? The answer starts with whether you have cornerstone content. A deep dive into sustainable publishing cadence.
